flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Clarendon College fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (30.8% → 25.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Clarendon College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (52.4% → 61.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Clarendon College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.5k).
